description:
2024 Range Rover Sport SV, 4.4L TC V8, AWD, 623bhp, 9 Speed Automatic. AED 689,000 AED 10,794 / Month with 50% Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 39,176 kms - Range Rover Warranty Valid Until 2nd September 2029 or 150,000 KMs - Range Rover Service Contract Valid Until 2nd September 2029 or 65,000 KMs - GCC specification (Al Tayer) - Price includes VAT 
 - All Season Package - Twin Blade Sun visors with Illuminated Vanity - Manual Rear Side Window Sun blinds - First and Second Row Smokers Pack - Front Centre Console Refrigerator Compartment - 23” Carbon Fibre Gloss Wheels - SV Bespoke Full Extended Leather Upgrade - Carbon Ceramic Matrix Braking System - Sliding Panoramic Roof - Yellow SV Carbon Ceramic Brake Callipers - SV Leather Steering Wheel - Obsidian Black Gloss Exterior - Light Cloud/Ebony Perforated Leather - Convenience Pack 5 Seats - Heads Up Display - Meridian Surround Sound - Heated and Ventilated Seats - Soft Close Doors - Automatically Deployable Side Step - Memory Function on Drivers Seat & Passenger - Adaptive Cruise Control - Lane Assist - Blind Spot Assist - Surround Cameras - Panoramic Roof
